roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC17(B) MOT TO REDUCE CHARGES -FILED

/CAL: DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,3 AND PC1203,4 MOTIONS/MO GRTD/X: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,3 IS GRANTED,//CTORD: PROBATION IN #2482906 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS SUCCESSFUL/X: MOTIONPURSUANT TO PC 1203,4 IS ALSO GRANTED BY THE COURT,/X: PURSUANT TO SIGNEDAND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X: ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/
/CAL:APD PC1203,3 AND  PC1203,4 MOTIONS/CONTD:SAME, PER DEFENSE COUNSEL'SREQUEST, FOR REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT ON 11-12-15 IN DEPT, S22 (PD RAJA TO OBTAIN)/DAWF/

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SANTA CLARA COUNTY TOSAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SANTA CLARA COUNTY TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/PROBEXP: 04-16-17/
/CAL: DEFENDANT'S PC 17(B) MOTION/NP/X: WITHDRAWN PER COUNSEL FOR DEFENDAN
/CAL:APD PC 1203,3, PC 1203,4 MOTION/X:APD WAS PREVIOUSLY GRANTED TRANSFER//CONT/DOP/
